titleStmt.title: SII 26.785: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 785. (A.R. No. 734 of 1909.) PŪRATTUKŌYIL, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Muktīśvara temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulaśēkharadēva: Year 28, Kaṉṉi (Puraṭṭāśi), ba. 10, Friday, Hastam = 1295 A.D., December 2, if the month is Dhanus.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a village as daṉmadāṉa by the nāṭṭavar (inhabitants) of Vaḍa-Kōṉāḍu in Uṟattūr-kūṟṟam in Kō-nāḍu alias Kaḍalaḍaiyādilaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu and the nāṭṭavar of Mudiyakkuḍi-nāḍu to the temple of Tirumuttīśuram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Kaḍuvaṉkuḍi in the same nāḍu. The village gifted was Kōpalakkuḍi (Gōpālakkuḍi) belonging to the same nāḍu. It was located to the west of Uḍaiyakuḍi, to the north of Koḍumbāḷūr to the east of Arampāḻikkal and to the south of Śemmaṅgalam and Akaḷaṅkanallūr. The gift is stated to have been made as a tax-free tirunāmattukkāṇi to provide for worship, repairs and festivals in the temple.

Besides the above-mentioned nāṭṭavars, Śellanambi of Kaṟṟalēri alias Vikkiramakēsarich-chaṟuvēdimaṅgalam, Vikkiramaśōḻar-mārāyaṉ, Vīraśōḻappiramārāyaṉ of Samuddiram, a certain person (name lost) of Kuḷattūr, a Brahmārāyaṉ of Samuddiram, Kurukulattaraiyaṉ of Kuḷattūr, Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Mūveḷḷāṉ, Vēṇāvuḍaiyāṉ and Viḻuppādarāyaṉ figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu
2 10 8 vatu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu Aparapakkaṣattu tecamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu
nāḷ koṉāṭāṉa kaṭalaṭaiyātilaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟattūr kūṟṟattu vaṭako
ṉāṭṭu nāṭṭavaromum mutiyakkuṭi nāṭṭu nāṭṭavaromum Innāṭṭuk kaṭuvaṉkuṭiyuṭaiyār
tirumutticuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil Āti taṇṭecuratevarkaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakku
Uruttira śrīmāyecurañ ceyvārkaḷukku nāṅkaḷ taṉmatāṉap piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricā
vatu Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭup paṟṟiliyāṉa kopālakkuṭikku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkel
lai Uṭaiyakuṭi Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai koṭumpāḷūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kellai Aṟampāḻikkallukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai cemmaṅkalattu Ellaikkum Akaḷaṅkanallū
rar Ellaikku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa naṉceyum puṉceyum meṉokkiya ma
raṅkaḷum kiḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟukaḷum kuḷamum koppu maṟṟum Eṟperpaṭṭa pirāttikaḷum Uṭpaṭa nāṅkaḷ Innā
yaṉāṟku tirukkaimmalaril Utakam paṇṇiṉapaṭiyile tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyākak koṇṭu pūcaiyum
tirupaṇiyum tiruḷumContraction for ‘nāḷ’ •celuttikkoḷḷak kaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Ikkuṭikā
ṭu nāṉkellaiyum tiruccūlatāpaṉam paṇṇik koḷḷakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu taṉmatāṉa Iṟaiyili piṭipā
ṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirumutticuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyili Ātitaṇṭecura tevarkaṉmi koyiṟ kaṇakku śrīmā
yecurakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum vaṭakonāṭṭu nāṭṭavaromum mutiyakku(ṭ)ṭi nāṭṭu nāṭṭavaromum Ippa
ṭikku kaṟṟaḷeriyāṉa vikkiramakecariccaṟuvetimaṅkalattuc cellanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku vikkiramacoḻa
rmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku camuttirattu viracoḻappiramārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kuḷattūruṭaiyā tevatāṉa
rāyaṉ Eḻuttu camuttirattu ppiramā ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik kuḷattūr kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
kulottuṅkacoḻa muveḷḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kameṉnaveli veṇā vuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu—
Digital edition of SII 26.785 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
